title: Add info button shell

tests.name: createInfoButton returns an HTMLButtonElement
tests.description: Verifies createInfoButton() produces a proper button element

tests.name: button has accessible label
tests.description: Button must have an aria-label or text content for accessibility

tests.name: button has the info button CSS class
tests.description: Button must carry the .eavi-info-btn class for styling

tests.name: createInfoOverlay returns an HTMLDivElement
tests.description: Verifies createInfoOverlay() produces a div element

tests.name: overlay is hidden by default
tests.description: Overlay must not be visible until the button is clicked

tests.name: overlay has the overlay CSS class
tests.description: Overlay must carry the .eavi-info-overlay class for styling

tests.name: overlay contains a close button
tests.description: Overlay must include a button to dismiss it

tests.name: clicking info button shows the overlay
tests.description: Clicking the info button toggles the overlay to visible state

tests.name: clicking close button hides the overlay
tests.description: Clicking the close button inside the overlay hides it

tests.name: pressing Escape closes the overlay
tests.description: Keyboard Escape key dismisses the overlay
acceptance_criteria: Overlay works on desktop and mobile

tests.name: clicking overlay backdrop closes the overlay
tests.description: Clicking the semi-transparent backdrop area closes the overlay

tests.name: overlay closes without triggering navigation or reload
tests.description: Closing the overlay must not cause a page reload or navigation

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-btn has position fixed
tests.description: Info button must be fixed-positioned to stay visible

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-btn has z-index
tests.description: Info button must have z-index to layer above canvas

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-btn has minimum 44px tap target
tests.description: Button must meet mobile tap target guidelines (44px minimum)
acceptance_criteria: Overlay works on desktop and mobile

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-overlay has position fixed
tests.description: Overlay must be fixed-positioned to cover viewport

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-overlay covers full viewport
tests.description: Overlay must span the entire viewport
acceptance_criteria: Overlay works on desktop and mobile

tests.name: CSS: .eavi-info-overlay has z-index above button
tests.description: Overlay z-index must be above the button layer

tests.name: info button is present in DOM after app init
tests.description: Integration test: main.ts must wire up and append the info button

tests.name: info overlay is present in DOM after app init
tests.description: Integration test: main.ts must wire up and append the overlay

tests.name: info overlay module does not access localStorage
tests.description: Privacy: overlay interactions must not touch localStorage

tests.name: info overlay module does not set cookies
tests.description: Privacy: overlay module must not set any cookies
